name: Black Walnut Chess Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pastry shell and chill.
2. Beat butter and sugar in a medium-sized bowl until well-mixed.
3. Add flour, salt, egg yolks, and evaporated milk to the mixture. Beat until well mixed.
4. Stir in vanilla and chopped walnuts.
5. Pour the mixture into the unbaked shell.
6. Bake on the lower rack of the oven at 375°F for 45 minutes or until the center is set but still soft.
7. Cool thoroughly.
